title: helictochloa gervaisii
intro: Helictochloa gervaisii, also known as Gervais' bentgrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helictochloa gervaisii include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made through infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
